DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEIVA, RAFAEL S AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RAFAEL LEIVA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. (CCP 430.10(E), (F) & (G).) PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE THE FIRST - THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION. (CCP 430.10(E).) THE PLEADINGS ARE NOT UNCERTAIN. (CCP 430.10(F).) THE COMPLAINT IS BASED ON COMMON COUNTS, AND A CONTRACT. THE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 430.10(G) IS INAPPLICABLE TO COMMON COUNTS CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: EDITH ALEXANDRYAN, ESQ., 818.534.3108, FOR PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE, LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RAFAEL LEIVA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled. (CCP 430.10(e), (f) & (g).) Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege the first - third causes of action. (CCP 430.10(e).) The pleadings are not uncertain. (CCP 430.10(f).) The Complaint is based on common counts, and a contract. The requirements of CCP 430.10(g) is inapplicable to common counts causes of action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Continued To Jan-16-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RAFAEL LEIVA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 16, 2014, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
